channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Catering Staff
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Sous Chef position is available on a cruise ship. Previous cruise experience is not required, but a strong background in large-volume catering as a Sous Chef or in a higher role is essential. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work in the hospitality sector at sea.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Ship at exciterecruitment.com

item.description:
Location: Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta and Seychelles
Description:

Opportunities are available for both freshers and experienced professionals in the hotel and catering sector for cruise ship positions. The offered salary ranges from 800 to 3500 USD, with visa, accommodation, and tickets provided. Positions are located in various destinations including the Maldives, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta, and Seychelles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hotel Staff Vacancy on Cruise Ships at Hello Hoteliers Career Management PVT. LTD.

item.description:
Location: Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta and Seychelles
Description:

Job openings are available for freshers and experienced individuals in the hotel, resort, and cruise sectors. Positions offer salaries ranging from 800 to 3500 USD, with visa, accommodation, and tickets provided. Locations include the Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta, and Seychelles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hotel and Cruise Staff Openings at Hello Hotelier's

item.description:
Location: Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta and Seychelles
Description:

Vacancies are available for freshers and experienced professionals in hotels, resorts, and on cruise ships. Positions offer salaries ranging from 800 to 3500 USD, with visa, accommodation, and tickets provided. Opportunities are located in the Maldives, on cruises, in the Gulf, Mauritius, Malta, and Seychelles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hotel ruise Ship Jobs - Freshers Experienced at Hello Hoteliers Career Management PVT. LTD.

item.description:
Location: Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta and Seychelles
Description:

Opportunities are available for freshers and experienced professionals in hotel and cruise ship roles. Positions offer a salary range of $800 – $3500 USD, with visa, accommodation, and tickets provided. Locations include Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta, and Seychelles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hotel and Cruise Staff Jobs - Salary up to $3500 at Hello Hoteliers

item.description:
Location: Europe
Description:

A Night Cook position is available on an MPSV vessel. The contract duration is 6 weeks +/- 1 week, with joining scheduled for August 5, 2026. Previous offshore experience and valid STCW certificates are required. The role is based in Europe.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cook Vacancy on MPSV at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Cook is sought for a Service Operation Vessel (SOV) flying the French RIF flag. The position offers a 4-week contract with a potential for a permanent 4 weeks on / 4 weeks off rotation. Joining is scheduled for 30 July 2026. Interested candidates or referrals are welcome to inquire.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cook Job on Service Operation Vessel (SOV) at Sailinga Crewing

item.description:
Location: Offshore / International
Description:

Experienced Catering Crew are sought for an upcoming assignment aboard an Offshore Construction / Pipe-Lay Vessel. Operations will be offshore and international, commencing next week for a duration of 2–2.5 weeks. Positions include First Cook, Second Cook, Steward, and Cook's Mate. Applicants require valid BOSIET with CA-EBS, full STCW certification, Marlins Test, relevant offshore vessel experience, a valid medical certificate, and good English command.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Crew Vacancy on Offshore Construction Vessel at TOS - Energy & Maritime Crew

item.description:
Location: Offshore / International
Description:

Experienced catering staff are sought for upcoming assignments aboard a Jack-Up/Offshore Support Vessel operating internationally. Open positions include Stewards and Cooks with various contract durations starting in late July 2026. Applicants must possess valid BOSIET with CA-EBS, STCW certifications, a Marlins Test, relevant offshore experience, and a valid medical certificate.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Crew Vacancies on Offshore Support Vessels at TOS - Energy & Maritime Crew

item.description:
Location: Offshore / International
Description:

Experienced catering crew are sought for an upcoming assignment aboard an offshore construction and pipe-lay vessel. Positions include First Cook, Second Cook, Steward, and Cook's Mate. Operations will be offshore and international, with a contract duration of 2 to 2.5 weeks. Candidates require valid BOSIET with CA-EBS, full STCW certification, Marlins Test, relevant offshore vessel experience, a valid medical certificate, and good English proficiency.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Crew Vacancies on Offshore Construction Vessel at TOS - Energy & Maritime Crew
